title: Oil Gains As Opecs Faster Increase In Output Fails To Impress The Market
section_path: Oil Gains As Opecs Faster Increase In Output Fails To Impress The Market
section_path_text: Oil Gains As Opecs Faster Increase In Output Fails To Impress The Market
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
Mixed economic data failed to impact sentiment in commodity markets, with supply side issues taking centre stage. Low inventories amid ongoing disruptions pushed most sectors higher. Crude oil prices gained, shrugging off OPEC's decision to boost output by larger increments in coming months amid signs of strong demand.
